mapper.select:
SELECT MAX(print_implementation_num) AS printImplementationNum FROM ( SELECT print_implementation_num FROM t_monthly_payroll_statement_detail
delete_flg = '0'
AND aggregate_period LIKE CONCAT(#{upYear}, '%')
LIMIT 30 OFFSET #{allPage} )page ;

SELECT aggregate_period AS aggregatePeriod, print_implementation_num AS printImplementationNum FROM t_monthly_payroll_statement_detail WHERE delete_flg = '0' AND print_implementation_num=( SELECT MAX(print_implementation_num) FROM t_monthly_payroll_statement_detail WHERE delete_flg = '0' AND aggregate_period LIKE CONCAT(#{upYear}, '%') )
;

SELECT aggregate_period AS aggregatePeriod, print_implementation_num AS printImplementationNum FROM t_monthly_payroll_statement_detail
delete_flg = '0'
AND aggregate_period LIKE CONCAT(#{upYear}, '%')
ORDER BY aggregate_period LIMIT 30 OFFSET #{allPage} ;

SELECT MAX(print_implementation_num) AS printImplementationNum FROM ( SELECT print_implementation_num FROM t_monthly_payroll_statement_detail WHERE delete_flg = '0' AND CAST(aggregate_period AS INTEGER) BETWEEN CAST(#{colectStartYearMonth} AS INTEGER) AND CAST(#{colectEndYearMonth} AS INTEGER)
LIMIT 30 OFFSET #{allPage} )page ;

SELECT aggregate_period AS aggregatePeriod, print_implementation_num AS printImplementationNum FROM t_monthly_payroll_statement_detail WHERE delete_flg = '0' AND CAST(aggregate_period AS INTEGER) BETWEEN CAST(#{colectStartYearMonth} AS INTEGER) AND CAST(#{colectEndYearMonth} AS INTEGER) LIMIT 30 OFFSET #{allPage};

SELECT aggregate_period AS aggregatePeriod, print_implementation_num AS printImplementationNum FROM t_monthly_payroll_statement_detail WHERE delete_flg = '0' AND CAST(aggregate_period AS INTEGER) BETWEEN CAST(#{colectStartYearMonth} AS INTEGER) AND CAST(#{colectEndYearMonth} AS INTEGER) LIMIT 30 OFFSET #{allPage};

UPDATE t_monthly_payroll_statement_detail SET delete_flg = '1' WHERE delete_flg = '0'
#{list}

SELECT employee_cd AS employeeCd, prescribed_work_date AS prescribedWorkDate, prescribed_work_count AS prescribedWorkCount, attendances_num AS attendancesNum, attendance_basic_days AS attendanceBasicDays, actual_working_hours AS actualWorkingHours, absenteeism_days AS absenteeismDays, absent_basic_days AS absentBasicDays, paid_days AS paidDays, used_paid_leave_hours AS usedPaidLeaveHours, unused_paid_leave_days AS unusedPaidLeaveDays, unused_paid_leave_hours AS unusedPaidLeaveHours, holiday_working_hours AS holidayWorkingHours, special_leave_days AS specialLeaveDays, base_salary AS baseSalary, basic_monthly_salary AS basicMonthlySalary, positional_allowance AS positionalAllowance, executive_compensation AS executiveCompensation, overtime_pay AS overtimePay, expenses_for_working_on_holidays AS expensesForWorkingOnHolidays, tax_free_com_expenses AS taxFreeComExpenses, tax_com_expenses AS taxComExpenses, income_tax AS incomeTax, income_tax_cumulative AS incomeTaxCumulative, resident_tax AS residentTax, tax_payment_cumulative AS taxPaymentCumulative, tax_table AS taxTable, welfare_pension_fund AS welfarePensionFund, emp_pension_ins AS empPensionIns, welfare_pension_standard_remuneration AS welfarePensionStandardRemuneration, social_ins_total AS socialInsTotal, social_insurance_premium_calculation AS socialInsurancePremiumCalculation, social_insurance_premium_adjustment AS socialInsurancePremiumAdjustment, social_insurance_premium_after_deduction AS socialInsurancePremiumAfterDeduction, emp_ins_fee AS empInsFee, health_ins_fee AS healthInsFee, health_insurance_standard_remuneration AS healthInsuranceStandardRemuneration, nurs_care_ins_fee AS nursCareInsFee, year_end_adjustment_withholding AS yearEndAdjustmentWithholding, year_end_adjustment_refund AS yearEndAdjustmentRefund, deduction_total AS deductionTotal, net_payment_total AS netPaymentTotal, number_of_dependents AS numberOfDependents FROM t_monthly_payroll_statement_detail WHERE aggregate_period = #{yearMonth} ;

SELECT employee_cd AS employeeCd, prescribed_work_date AS prescribedWorkDate, prescribed_work_count AS prescribedWorkCount, attendances_num AS attendancesNum, attendance_basic_days AS attendanceBasicDays, actual_working_hours AS actualWorkingHours, absenteeism_days AS absenteeismDays, absent_basic_days AS absentBasicDays, paid_days AS paidDays, used_paid_leave_hours AS usedPaidLeaveHours, unused_paid_leave_days AS unusedPaidLeaveDays, unused_paid_leave_hours AS unusedPaidLeaveHours, holiday_working_hours AS holidayWorkingHours, special_leave_days AS specialLeaveDays, base_salary AS baseSalary, basic_monthly_salary AS basicMonthlySalary, positional_allowance AS positionalAllowance, executive_compensation AS executiveCompensation, overtime_pay AS overtimePay, expenses_for_working_on_holidays AS expensesForWorkingOnHolidays, tax_free_com_expenses AS taxFreeComExpenses, tax_com_expenses AS taxComExpenses, income_tax AS incomeTax, income_tax_cumulative AS incomeTaxCumulative, resident_tax AS residentTax, tax_payment_cumulative AS taxPaymentCumulative, tax_table AS taxTable, welfare_pension_fund AS welfarePensionFund, emp_pension_ins AS empPensionIns, welfare_pension_standard_remuneration AS welfarePensionStandardRemuneration, social_ins_total AS socialInsTotal, social_insurance_premium_calculation AS socialInsurancePremiumCalculation, social_insurance_premium_adjustment AS socialInsurancePremiumAdjustment, social_insurance_premium_after_deduction AS socialInsurancePremiumAfterDeduction, emp_ins_fee AS empInsFee, health_ins_fee AS healthInsFee, health_insurance_standard_remuneration AS healthInsuranceStandardRemuneration, nurs_care_ins_fee AS nursCareInsFee, year_end_adjustment_withholding AS yearEndAdjustmentWithholding, year_end_adjustment_refund AS yearEndAdjustmentRefund, deduction_total AS deductionTotal, net_payment_total AS netPaymentTotal, number_of_dependents AS numberOfDependents FROM t_monthly_payroll_statement_detail WHERE aggregate_period LIKE CONCAT(#{year}, '%') ;

SELECT employee_cd AS employeeCd, prescribed_work_date AS prescribedWorkDate, prescribed_work_count AS prescribedWorkCount, attendances_num AS attendancesNum, attendance_basic_days AS attendanceBasicDays, actual_working_hours AS actualWorkingHours, absenteeism_days AS absenteeismDays, absent_basic_days AS absentBasicDays, paid_days AS paidDays, used_paid_leave_hours AS usedPaidLeaveHours, unused_paid_leave_days AS unusedPaidLeaveDays, unused_paid_leave_hours AS unusedPaidLeaveHours, holiday_working_hours AS holidayWorkingHours, special_leave_days AS specialLeaveDays, base_salary AS baseSalary, basic_monthly_salary AS basicMonthlySalary, positional_allowance AS positionalAllowance, executive_compensation AS executiveCompensation, overtime_pay AS overtimePay, expenses_for_working_on_holidays AS expensesForWorkingOnHolidays, tax_free_com_expenses AS taxFreeComExpenses, tax_com_expenses AS taxComExpenses, income_tax AS incomeTax, income_tax_cumulative AS incomeTaxCumulative, resident_tax AS residentTax, tax_payment_cumulative AS taxPaymentCumulative, tax_table AS taxTable, welfare_pension_fund AS welfarePensionFund, emp_pension_ins AS empPensionIns, welfare_pension_standard_remuneration AS welfarePensionStandardRemuneration, social_ins_total AS socialInsTotal, social_insurance_premium_calculation AS socialInsurancePremiumCalculation, social_insurance_premium_adjustment AS socialInsurancePremiumAdjustment, social_insurance_premium_after_deduction AS socialInsurancePremiumAfterDeduction, emp_ins_fee AS empInsFee, health_ins_fee AS healthInsFee, health_insurance_standard_remuneration AS healthInsuranceStandardRemuneration, nurs_care_ins_fee AS nursCareInsFee, year_end_adjustment_withholding AS yearEndAdjustmentWithholding, year_end_adjustment_refund AS yearEndAdjustmentRefund, deduction_total AS deductionTotal, net_payment_total AS netPaymentTotal, number_of_dependents AS numberOfDependents FROM t_monthly_payroll_statement_detail WHERE aggregate_period = #{yearMonth} ;
